title: Classic German Sausage Stew
description: A hearty and comforting stew made with German sausage and a variety of vegetables. Perfect for a cold winter's night.

ingredients.name: German sausage
ingredients.notes: Choose a high-quality sausage with a good balance of flavor and texture

ingredients.name: garlicky stew meat
ingredients.notes: Look for a cut that is well-marbled and has a good amount of flavor

ingredients.name: bouncy carrots
ingredients.notes: Choose carrots that are firm and have a good crunch

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: Choose an onion that is sweet and has a good flavor

ingredients.name: potatoes
ingredients.notes: Choose potatoes that are high in starch and have a good flavor

instructions: Brown the German sausage in a large pot over medium-high heat.
Remove the sausage from the pot and set it aside.
Add the garlicky stew meat to the pot and brown it on all sides.
Remove the stew meat from the pot and set it aside with the sausage.
Add the bouncy carrots and onion to the pot and sauté them until they are tender.
Add the potatoes to the pot and sauté them for a few minutes.
Add the browned sausage and stew meat back to the pot.
Add enough broth to the pot to cover the ingredients.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer it for 30 minutes.
Season the stew with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
